Appearances:
Plaintiff Ian Haddow is present.
Terence O. Mayo Attorney for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Conte.is present.
Attorney Wynne Cathcart Erickson appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Sep. 16, 2013 remains on calendar. (D501/JPT)
